paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05, with a change of 2.02% from the prior close and -36.32% over a window of 20 sessions. The price is as of July 17, 2026. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.

There have been various SEC filings, including an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson.
